description: Multi-source query strategy for comp-018. Per Open Enzyme CLAUDE.md tool discipline (§Tool discipline) — Paperclip MCP for PMC/arXiv/bioRxiv/medRxiv full text and OpenAlex abstracts ONLY (NOT for CNKI / WanFang / J-STAGE — wrong corpus). Direct multilingual searches (CNKI, WanFang, J-STAGE) handled via the model's native multilingual training, not Paperclip. Paperclip `map` operator forbidden per memory/feedback_paperclip_map_unreliable.md.

primary_sources.name: PubMed via mcp__plugin_pubmed_PubMed
primary_sources.use: depth pass for English-language complement biology + natural-product anticomplement literature
primary_sources.query_pattern: (target_node OR target_synonyms) AND (compound_class OR specific_compound) AND (inhibit* OR antagonist OR modulator)

primary_sources.name: Paperclip MCP via mcp__paperclip
primary_sources.use: PMC/arXiv/bioRxiv/medRxiv full-text grep + scan for line-anchored verification of load-bearing IC50 values

primary_sources.name: ChEMBL (per-compound)
primary_sources.use: bioactivity coverage check for each candidate compound; document ChEMBL-coverage gap explicitly per comp-013 precedent (5/9 TCM compounds had zero ChEMBL data)
primary_sources.expected: natural-product compounds especially classical TCM and fungal will largely be ABSENT from ChEMBL — that is the documented gap, not a methodology failure

multilingual_sources_direct_read.name: CNKI / WanFang (Chinese)
multilingual_sources_direct_read.use: TCM materia medica anticomplement evidence; Chinese-language clinical and biochem papers
multilingual_sources_direct_read.translation_protocol: two-model cross-check per CLAUDE.md §Translation protocol — Claude (Anthropic) + DeepSeek V4-Pro (Chinese-vendor) for load-bearing claims. Surface disagreements with inline {Model A | Model B} annotations.
multilingual_sources_direct_read.comp018_phase: Phase 1 sample read; full ingestion deferred to Phase 2 if hits warrant

multilingual_sources_direct_read.name: J-STAGE / CiNii (Japanese)
multilingual_sources_direct_read.use: Kampo medicine literature; Japanese natural product chemistry (Magnolia tiliroside source corpus)

multilingual_sources_direct_read.name: KISS / RISS (Korean)
multilingual_sources_direct_read.use: Korean natural-product chemistry — substantial anticomplement-flavone literature lives here

search_macros_executed_2026_05_08.query: ("C1q" OR "C1 esterase") AND natural-product AND inhibit*
search_macros_executed_2026_05_08.yield: C1q literature predominantly in MeSH-indexed Western pharma context; little direct natural-product coverage

search_macros_executed_2026_05_08.query: "complement C3 convertase" AND (inhibit* OR antagonist) AND (natural OR plant OR herbal OR flavonoid OR triterpene OR saponin OR polysaccharide OR fungal OR mushroom)
search_macros_executed_2026_05_08.yield: PRIMARY HIT CORPUS — rosmarinic acid (PMID 3198307) is the seed; everything downstream cites it as positive control
depth on rosmarinic acid mechanism + in vivo precedent

search_macros_executed_2026_05_08.query: ("Ganoderma" OR "Cordyceps" OR "Inonotus" OR "Lentinula" OR "Trametes" OR "Hericium") AND complement
search_macros_executed_2026_05_08.yield: Ganoderma triterpenes (PMID 20091270) confirm fungal anticomplement chemistry

search_macros_executed_2026_05_08.query: (berberine OR quercetin OR luteolin OR baicalein OR EGCG OR curcumin) AND complement AND (C3 OR convertase) AND IC50
search_macros_executed_2026_05_08.yield: Luteolin (PMID 18400428) most-potent flavonoid CP+AP in CH50/AP50 0.19/0.17 mM
Streptomyces NPRPS-derived peptide; precedent for bacterial-actinobacterial anticomplement chemistry
K-76 = filifolinol-derived sesquiterpene C5 inhibitor; IC50 570 µM crude (PMID 22835722); semi-synthetic improvements possible

search_macros_executed_2026_05_08.query: anticomplement* AND (polysaccharide OR triterpene OR saponin) AND IC50
search_macros_executed_2026_05_08.yield: Bupleurum polysaccharides (Wu 2015 PMID 26579461) lectin pathway IC50 0.98-1.06 mg/mL; cycloartane triterpenes (Mu 2013 PMID 24144800) ~137-200 µM; oleanane triterpenes from Aceriphyllum (PMID 22870809) IC50 77.5-348 µM

verification_gate_protocol: Per CLAUDE.md Rule 4 — every IC50 / mechanism / dose claim grep-verified against primary source line-anchor BEFORE wiki commit. Where source is paywalled and no PMC mirror exists, claim is marked [UNVERIFIED — abstract-tier] explicitly.
